patient_assessment.summary: Patient has a mild sore throat without other concerning symptoms.

runs.routing_note: No physician agent consult required; use patient assessment for routine guidance.

patient_assessment.summary: Patient has sudden crushing chest pain radiating to the left arm with shortness of breath and clammy skin.

doctor_consult.recommendation: Obtain a 12-lead ECG immediately and administer aspirin and nitroglycerin if no contraindications. Continuous cardiac monitoring and IV access are essential. Rule out acute myocardial infarction and other life-threatening causes of chest pain.
doctor_consult.disclaimers: This is triage support only and not a substitute for in-person evaluation.

runs.routing_note: Physician agent consulted for borderline or critical presentation.

patient_assessment.summary: Patient has fever, headache, and neck stiffness.

doctor_consult.recommendation: Obtain vital signs, including temperature and neurological exam. Rule out meningitis and encephalitis given fever and neck stiffness. Administer antipyretics for fever and pain control.
doctor_consult.disclaimers: This is triage support only and not a substitute for in-person evaluation.

runs.routing_note: Physician agent consulted for borderline or critical presentation.
